evidences.content: The speaker introduces Week 1 of the Houdini for 3D artists course, explaining that this week focuses on concepts and technical material.
evidences.speaker: Instructor

evidences.content: The speaker suggests that users who have never used Houdini before should watch a beginner tutorial on procedural modeling.
evidences.speaker: Instructor

evidences.content: The speaker plays a clip from the beginner tutorial covering an introduction to Houdini interface and basic navigation.
evidences.speaker: Instructor

evidences.content: The instructor begins the Week 1 overview, mentioning the first part will cover basic concepts as a refresher.
evidences.speaker: Instructor

evidences.content: The instructor recommends a free 3+ hour beginner tutorial for Houdini newbies.
evidences.speaker: Instructor

evidences.content: The instructor transitions to the basic overview of what will be covered this week.
evidences.speaker: Instructor
